debug_info.goal:
nums : List ℤ
h_precond : maxStrength_precond nums
⊢ maxStrength_postcond nums (maxStrength nums h_precond) h_precond

failed_attempts:
have h1 : nums ≠ [] := h_precond
  have h2 : (List.range (2 ^ nums.length)).map (fun mask =>
    (List.range nums.length).foldr (fun i acc =>
      if (mask.shiftRight i).land 1 == 1 then nums[i]! :: acc else acc
    ) []) = nums.sublists := by
    apply Eq.symm
    rw [List.sublists_eq_map]
    rfl
  rw [h2]
  simp [List.max?_eq_max]
  <;> aesop

have h1 : nums ≠ [] := h_precond
  have h2 : (List.sublists nums).filter (· ≠ []) = (List.sublists nums).filter (· ≠ []) := rfl
  have h3 : List.sublists nums = (fun l => l) <$> (List.sublists nums) := by simp
  have h4 : ∀ l ∈ (List.sublists nums).filter (· ≠ []), l ≠ [] := by
    intro l hl
    simp_all
  have h5 : List.max? (List.map (List.foldl (· * ·) 1) ((List.sublists nums).filter (· ≠ []))) =
      List.max? (List.map (List.foldl (· * ·) 1) ((List.sublists nums).filter (· ≠ []))) := rfl
  cases' List.max? (List.map (List.foldl (· * ·) 1) ((List.sublists nums).filter (· ≠ []))) with m
  case none =>
    exfalso
    have h6 : (List.sublists nums).filter (· ≠ []) ≠ [] := by
      apply List.filter_ne_nil_of_mem
      use nums
      constructor
      · exact List.mem_sublists_self nums
      · exact h1
    have h7 : List.map (List.foldl (· * ·) 1) ((List.sublists nums).filter (· ≠ [])) ≠ [] := by
      apply List.map_ne_nil
      exact h6
    exact List.max?_eq_none.mp rfl h7
  case some m =>
    constructor
    · apply List.contains_of_mem_max?
      exact List.max?_mem (List.map (List.foldl (· * ·) 1) ((List.sublists nums).filter (· ≠ []))) m
    · intro x hx
      apply List.le_of_mem_max?
      exact List.max?_mem (List.map (List.foldl (· * ·) 1) ((List.sublists nums).filter (· ≠ []))) m
      exact hx

  have h_sublists_eq : (nums.sublists.filter (· ≠ [])).map (List.foldl (· * ·) 1) =

          ) [])
          (List.range (2 ^ nums.length))))):= by

    rfl

  have h_max : List.max? ((List.map (fun subset => List.foldl (fun acc x => acc * x) 1 subset)

          (List.range nums.length).foldr (fun i acc =>
            if (mask.shiftRight i).land 1 == 1 then nums[i]! :: acc else acc
          ) [])
          (List.range (2 ^ nums.length)))))) = List.max? ((nums.sublists.filter (· ≠ [])).map (List.foldl (· * ·) 1)) := by
    rw [← h_sublists_eq]
  rw [h_max]
  cases' List.max? ((nums.sublists.filter (· ≠ [])).map (List.foldl (· * ·) 1)) with m

have : nums ≠ [] := h_precond
  have : (List.sublists nums).filter (· ≠ []) = (List.sublists nums).filter (· ≠ []) := rfl
  suffices : (List.map (fun subset => List.foldl (· * ·) 1 subset)
      ((List.sublists nums).filter (· ≠ []))).contains
      (List.max? (List.map (fun subset => List.foldl (· * ·) 1 subset)
        ((List.sublists nums).filter (· ≠ [])))).getD (-1000000)) ∧
      (List.map (fun subset => List.foldl (· * ·) 1 subset)
        ((List.sublists nums).filter (· ≠ []))).all
        (· ≤ (List.max? (List.map (fun subset => List.foldl (· * ·) 1 subset)
          ((List.sublists nums).filter (· ≠ [])))).getD (-1000000))) by
    simpa [this]
  cases' List.max? (List.map (fun subset => List.foldl (· * ·) 1 subset)
      ((List.sublists nums).filter (· ≠ []))) with m
  case none =>
    simp_all
  case some m =>
    simp_all
    exact ⟨List.mem_of_max?_eq_some (by rfl), fun x hx => List.le_of_max?_eq_some (by rfl) hx⟩
